name: Tuna Spinach Au Gratin
recipeIngredient: 7 oz. canned tuna, drained and flaked
10 oz. frozen chopped spinach, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first seven ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Spoon the mixture into individual shells or a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle with additional cheese.
4. Bake in an oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (moderate) for 20 minutes.
5. Serve 4 portions.
